family_summary: Major Tet Offensive urban battle in Hue, Thua Thien Province, South Vietnam, fought by PAVN/VC against ARVN, U.S. Marines, U.S. Army, and Vietnamese Marines. Published source coverage is strongest at whole-city battle level, but force posture and geography changed materially across sub-phases.
notes: Bundle emphasizes the single-city episode and direct violent deaths only. Core DR uses strict exclusion of unknown-status deaths and excludes ambiguous 'dead or missing' totals from the civilian direct-death numerator.
